name: Lawyer
description: Represent clients in legal matters, draft contracts, and advocate in court proceedings.

levels.title: Junior Associate
levels.description: Handle research and assist senior attorneys with case preparation.

levels.title: Senior Associate
levels.description: Lead cases independently and mentor junior associates.

levels.title: Partner
levels.description: Shape the firm's direction while managing high-profile clients and complex litigation.

name: Legal Consultant
description: Advise organizations on regulatory compliance, risk management, and legal strategy.

levels.title: Consultant
levels.description: Analyze legal frameworks and prepare compliance reports for clients.

levels.title: Senior Consultant
levels.description: Develop legal strategies and manage client relationships across multiple projects.

levels.title: Managing Consultant
levels.description: Oversee a portfolio of high-value clients and guide the firm's consulting practice.

name: Writer
description: Craft compelling narratives, articles, and creative content for publication.

levels.title: Junior Writer
levels.description: Write drafts and contribute content under editorial guidance.

levels.title: Staff Writer
levels.description: Produce original pieces and develop your own voice within the publication.

levels.title: Lead Writer
levels.description: Set the editorial tone and spearhead major features and investigative stories.

name: Editor
description: Review, refine, and shape written content to ensure clarity, style, and accuracy.

levels.title: Assistant Editor
levels.description: Proofread manuscripts and assist with editorial scheduling.

levels.title: Editor
levels.description: Manage publication pipelines and work directly with authors on revisions.

levels.title: Senior Editor
levels.description: Curate the publication's identity and acquire high-profile manuscripts.

name: Museum Curator
description: Manage collections, design exhibitions, and preserve cultural heritage for public engagement.

levels.title: Assistant Curator
levels.description: Catalog artifacts and support the planning of temporary exhibitions.

levels.title: Curator
levels.description: Design major exhibitions and build relationships with donors and institutions.

levels.title: Head Curator
levels.description: Direct the museum's curatorial vision and oversee the entire permanent collection.

name: Historian
description: Research and interpret historical events, producing scholarly works and public-facing analyses.

levels.title: Research Assistant
levels.description: Gather primary sources and support senior researchers with archival work.

levels.title: Historian
levels.description: Conduct independent research and publish findings in academic journals.

levels.title: Senior Historian
levels.description: Lead research programs and serve as a recognized authority in your specialty.

name: Software Developer
description: Design, build, and maintain software systems that solve real-world problems.

levels.title: Junior Developer
levels.description: Write code, fix bugs, and learn the codebase under senior guidance.

levels.title: Senior Developer
levels.description: Architect features, review code, and drive technical decisions for your team.

levels.title: Lead Developer
levels.description: Define the technical roadmap and mentor the entire engineering organization.

name: Data Analyst
description: Transform raw data into actionable insights that drive business decisions.

levels.title: Junior Analyst
levels.description: Clean datasets and produce basic reports and visualizations.

levels.title: Data Analyst
levels.description: Build analytical models and present findings to stakeholders.

levels.title: Senior Analyst
levels.description: Lead data strategy initiatives and influence company-wide decision-making.

name: Civil Engineer
description: Plan and oversee the construction of infrastructure from bridges to water systems.

levels.title: Junior Engineer
levels.description: Assist with site surveys, calculations, and technical drawings.

levels.title: Engineer
levels.description: Manage construction phases and ensure projects meet safety standards.

levels.title: Senior Engineer
levels.description: Lead large-scale infrastructure projects and approve critical design decisions.

name: Project Engineer
description: Coordinate engineering teams and manage project timelines, budgets, and deliverables.

levels.title: Junior Project Engineer
levels.description: Track project milestones and support coordination between teams.

levels.title: Project Engineer
levels.description: Own project delivery end-to-end and manage stakeholder expectations.

levels.title: Senior Project Engineer
levels.description: Oversee a portfolio of engineering projects and optimize resource allocation.

name: General Practitioner
description: Diagnose and treat patients, providing primary healthcare and preventive medicine.

levels.title: Resident
levels.description: Complete clinical rotations and treat patients under supervision.

levels.title: Attending Physician
levels.description: Run your own patient panel and make independent clinical decisions.

levels.title: Senior Physician
levels.description: Lead a medical department and shape clinical protocols for the practice.

name: Clinical Researcher
description: Conduct medical studies and clinical trials to advance treatments and patient outcomes.

levels.title: Research Associate
levels.description: Collect data, recruit participants, and assist with trial protocols.

levels.title: Researcher
levels.description: Design studies, analyze results, and publish in peer-reviewed journals.

levels.title: Senior Researcher
levels.description: Direct multi-site clinical trials and secure major research grants.

name: Postdoc in Constitutional Law
description: Pursue advanced research on constitutional frameworks, rights, and governance structures.

levels.title: Postdoc Researcher
levels.description: Conduct independent research and contribute to departmental publications.

levels.title: Senior Postdoc
levels.description: Lead research projects and supervise graduate students.

levels.title: Research Fellow
levels.description: Hold a prestigious fellowship and shape the direction of the research group.

name: Postdoc in International Law
description: Research treaties, international courts, and cross-border legal issues at the academic frontier.

levels.title: Postdoc Researcher
levels.description: Analyze international legal precedents and draft policy papers.

levels.title: Senior Postdoc
levels.description: Manage collaborative research with partner institutions abroad.

levels.title: Research Fellow
levels.description: Advise international bodies and publish landmark studies in the field.

name: Postdoc in Creative Writing
description: Explore the craft of storytelling through academic research and literary experimentation.

levels.title: Postdoc Researcher
levels.description: Develop original literary works while contributing to scholarly discourse.

levels.title: Senior Postdoc
levels.description: Mentor emerging writers and lead creative workshops.

levels.title: Research Fellow
levels.description: Hold a distinguished fellowship and publish critically acclaimed research.

name: Postdoc in Comparative Literature
description: Study literary traditions across cultures and languages to uncover shared human themes.

levels.title: Postdoc Researcher
levels.description: Conduct cross-cultural literary analysis and present at academic conferences.

levels.title: Senior Postdoc
levels.description: Lead a comparative research project spanning multiple literary traditions.

levels.title: Research Fellow
levels.description: Establish yourself as a leading voice in comparative literary scholarship.

name: Postdoc in Ancient History
description: Investigate ancient civilizations through archaeological evidence and primary sources.

levels.title: Postdoc Researcher
levels.description: Analyze artifacts and texts to reconstruct ancient societies.

levels.title: Senior Postdoc
levels.description: Direct archaeological digs and publish monographs on your findings.

levels.title: Research Fellow
levels.description: Lead a research group uncovering new chapters of ancient history.

name: Postdoc in Modern History
description: Research the political, social, and cultural forces that shaped the modern world.

levels.title: Postdoc Researcher
levels.description: Examine archival records and oral histories from recent centuries.

levels.title: Senior Postdoc
levels.description: Produce influential papers on pivotal modern-era events.

levels.title: Research Fellow
levels.description: Shape public understanding of modern history through landmark research.

name: Postdoc in Machine Learning
description: Push the boundaries of artificial intelligence through novel algorithms and model architectures.

levels.title: Postdoc Researcher
levels.description: Develop and benchmark new machine learning models.

levels.title: Senior Postdoc
levels.description: Lead a research team and publish at top-tier AI conferences.

levels.title: Research Fellow
levels.description: Pioneer breakthrough approaches that redefine the state of the art.

name: Postdoc in Security Systems
description: Research advanced cybersecurity defenses and vulnerability analysis methodologies.

levels.title: Postdoc Researcher
levels.description: Investigate emerging threat vectors and develop countermeasures.

levels.title: Senior Postdoc
levels.description: Lead security research initiatives and advise industry partners.

levels.title: Research Fellow
levels.description: Define next-generation security paradigms through groundbreaking research.

name: Postdoc in Autonomous Systems
description: Advance the science of self-operating machines, from drones to self-driving vehicles.

levels.title: Postdoc Researcher
levels.description: Build and test autonomous prototypes in controlled environments.

levels.title: Senior Postdoc
levels.description: Design perception and decision-making systems for real-world deployment.

levels.title: Research Fellow
levels.description: Lead a lab producing industry-defining advances in autonomous technology.

name: Postdoc in Structural Engineering
description: Research innovative structural designs and materials to build safer, more resilient infrastructure.

levels.title: Postdoc Researcher
levels.description: Simulate structural loads and test new composite materials.

levels.title: Senior Postdoc
levels.description: Publish structural analysis breakthroughs and consult on major projects.

levels.title: Research Fellow
levels.description: Redefine structural engineering standards through pioneering research.

name: Postdoc in Surgical Innovation
description: Develop cutting-edge surgical techniques and technologies to improve patient outcomes.

levels.title: Postdoc Researcher
levels.description: Prototype new surgical instruments and refine minimally invasive procedures.

levels.title: Senior Postdoc
levels.description: Lead clinical studies validating innovative surgical approaches.

levels.title: Research Fellow
levels.description: Transform surgical practice through widely adopted research innovations.

name: Postdoc in Cognitive Neuroscience
description: Unravel the neural mechanisms behind cognition, memory, and behavior.

levels.title: Postdoc Researcher
levels.description: Design neuroimaging experiments and analyze brain activity data.

levels.title: Senior Postdoc
levels.description: Run your own research projects and mentor doctoral students.

levels.title: Research Fellow
levels.description: Lead a neuroscience lab producing high-impact discoveries about the human mind.

name: Office Assistant
description: Keep the office running smoothly by handling schedules, correspondence, and administrative tasks.

levels.title: Junior Assistant
levels.description: Sort mail, answer phones, and manage basic filing duties.

levels.title: Office Assistant
levels.description: Coordinate meetings, manage supplies, and support multiple departments.

levels.title: Senior Assistant
levels.description: Oversee office operations and train new administrative staff.

name: Sales Associate
description: Engage customers, demonstrate products, and close sales on the retail floor.

levels.title: Junior Sales
levels.description: Greet customers and learn the product catalog.

levels.title: Sales Associate
levels.description: Hit sales targets and build a loyal customer base.

levels.title: Senior Sales
levels.description: Mentor the sales team and manage key client accounts.

name: Technician
description: Install, maintain, and repair technical equipment and systems.

levels.title: Junior Technician
levels.description: Perform routine maintenance and assist with basic repairs.

levels.title: Technician
levels.description: Diagnose complex issues and carry out specialized repairs independently.

levels.title: Senior Technician
levels.description: Lead technical teams and handle the most challenging system failures.

name: Graphic Designer
description: Create visual concepts that communicate ideas and captivate audiences.

levels.title: Junior Designer
levels.description: Produce layouts and graphics following brand guidelines.

levels.title: Designer
levels.description: Develop original visual identities and lead design projects.

levels.title: Senior Designer
levels.description: Set the creative direction and manage the design team's output.

name: Bartender
description: Mix drinks, create cocktails, and keep the bar atmosphere lively for guests.

levels.title: Barback
levels.description: Stock the bar, clean glassware, and learn the basics of mixology.

levels.title: Bartender
levels.description: Serve customers, craft cocktails, and manage the bar during your shift.

levels.title: Head Bartender
levels.description: Design the drink menu and train new bartenders.

name: Cashier
description: Process transactions, handle cash, and provide friendly customer service at the register.

levels.title: Trainee Cashier
levels.description: Learn the register system and handle simple transactions.

levels.title: Cashier
levels.description: Process all transaction types efficiently and handle customer inquiries.

levels.title: Head Cashier
levels.description: Supervise the checkout area and reconcile daily cash drawers.

name: Delivery Driver
description: Transport packages and goods to customers quickly and reliably.

levels.title: Driver
levels.description: Follow delivery routes and ensure packages arrive on time.

levels.title: Senior Driver
levels.description: Handle priority deliveries and optimize your daily route.

levels.title: Route Manager
levels.description: Plan delivery logistics and coordinate a team of drivers.

name: Waiter
description: Take orders, serve meals, and ensure guests have an excellent dining experience.

levels.title: Busser
levels.description: Clear tables, set up dining areas, and assist the wait staff.

levels.title: Waiter
levels.description: Manage your own section and provide attentive table service.

levels.title: Head Waiter
levels.description: Coordinate the front-of-house team and handle VIP guests.

name: Freelance Work
description: Take on short-term gigs and independent projects across various fields.

levels.title: Freelancer
levels.description: Pick up odd jobs and build a reputation through small projects.

levels.title: Experienced Freelancer
levels.description: Attract repeat clients and command higher rates for your work.

levels.title: Expert Freelancer
levels.description: Choose premium projects and enjoy a steady stream of referrals.

name: Dog Walking
description: Walk dogs for busy pet owners, keeping furry friends happy and exercised.

levels.title: Dog Walker
levels.description: Walk one or two dogs at a time around the neighborhood.

levels.title: Professional Walker
levels.description: Handle multiple dogs and build a loyal roster of regular clients.

levels.title: Walking Service Owner
levels.description: Run your own dog walking business and hire other walkers.

name: Tutoring
description: Help students grasp difficult subjects through one-on-one or small group sessions.

levels.title: Tutor
levels.description: Assist students with homework and exam preparation.

levels.title: Senior Tutor
levels.description: Develop custom lesson plans and take on advanced subject areas.

levels.title: Head Tutor
levels.description: Manage a tutoring center and coordinate a team of subject specialists.

name: Moving Help
description: Assist with packing, loading, and transporting belongings during residential moves.

levels.title: Mover
levels.description: Lift boxes, load trucks, and follow the team leader's instructions.

levels.title: Experienced Mover
levels.description: Handle fragile items and large furniture with practiced efficiency.

levels.title: Team Leader
levels.description: Organize the moving crew and ensure every job finishes on time.
